creator: gerard_seibert@outlook.com
text:
(In reply to Bjoern A. Zeeb from comment #207)

The device works flawlessly on MS-Windows; no surprise there, and I have seen it work on at least on *nix distro. Unfortunately, I don't remember which one.

So, my question is, why has no one found a cure after all this time? I suppose using the code from Windows is not an option, but why not employ code from a Linux distro that does work correctly?

An open bug of over two years on a commonly available device does not bode well for potential users of FreeBSD.
